creator: anderson@cnpm.embrapa.br
text:
Postgis upgrade to 1.3.5

 This release is a small bug fix release, including a critical fix for using PostGIS with Mapserver and LINE layers.

Fix: 

---

diff -Nur postgis.old/Makefile postgis/Makefile

+++ postgis/Makefile	2008-12-18 09:22:34.000000000 -0200
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	postgis
-DISTVERSION=	1.3.4
+DISTVERSION=	1.3.5
 CATEGORIES=	databases geography
 MASTER_SITES=	http://postgis.refractions.net/download/

+++ postgis/distinfo	2008-12-18 09:25:07.000000000 -0200
